message:
test(bundle): add comprehensive unit tests for bundle.rs

Adds 20+ new tests covering:
- Argument conflict handling (--skills vs --from-dir)
- Argument dependencies (--sign-key requires --sign)
- Short flags (-f for --force)
- Combined options (--draft and --prerelease together)
- Edge cases for helper functions (extra commas, unicode, empty input)
- Serialization of all report structs (JSON output)

Total: 61 unit tests for bundle.rs now covering all argument parsing,
helper functions, and report serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
